hero.subtitle: Clarivus builds proprietary intelligence about your business and turns it into growth decisions before problems arise.

integrations.title: Connects with the platforms you already use

platformSection.label: The Platform
platformSection.title:
Intelligence that knows
your business.
platformSection.subtitle: Clarivus is not another data tool. It's the first platform where AI gets smarter about your business every week and acts before you need to ask.

proprietaryMemory.title: Proprietary Memory
proprietaryMemory.desc: CPL history, seasonality, creative patterns, and real CVRs by product and channel. An asset that grows with your business and no generic AI can replicate.

noConflict.title: No Conflict of Interest
noConflict.desc: Platform tools are incentivized to increase your media spend. Clarivus is incentivized by your real ROAS and net revenue. When a campaign is not worth it, it says so.

earlyWarning.title: Early Warning
earlyWarning.desc: Detects performance drop signals 48 to 72 hours before they appear on any dashboard. You act on the problem before it becomes a loss.

leadToCash.title: Lead to Cash
leadToCash.desc: Connects top of funnel, qualification, sales, and real revenue in a single intelligence layer. Marketing, SDR, closer, and finance speak the same language, with the same data, in real time.

unifiedDashboard.title: Unified Dashboard
unifiedDashboard.desc: Spend, ROAS, CPL, and funnel from first click to conversion. Updates every 5 minutes.

weeklyIntelligence.title: Weekly Intelligence
weeklyIntelligence.desc: Analysis of the last 7 days: what worked, what didn't, and 3 concrete actions for the week.

optimizationQueue.title: Optimization Queue
optimizationQueue.desc: Detection of saturation, high CPA, and scaling opportunities. Ready proposal. You approve, it executes via API.

competitorIntel.title: Competitor Intel
competitorIntel.desc: Monitors competitor ads via Meta Ad Library. AI highlights the angles they use that you haven't explored yet.

agent.title:
Manage by
chat.
agent.subtitle: Chat with a copilot that reads your data in real time, proposes changes with justification, and executes with your approval. Strategy and operations in one place.
features: Ask "why did my ROAS drop?" — get analysis with real account data
Ask to create a new campaign — the agent guides the process with questions
Approve or reject proposed actions. Nothing executes without your confirmation
History saved — the agent learns the account context over time

whoItsFor.title:
Clarivus was built for those who are
already good and want to go further.
items: Marketing professionals who want decisions, not more data
Revenue teams that need visibility from lead to close
Managers who don't have a strategist available at any hour
Any business that is tired of explaining their history to an AI every time

howAndStats.howTitle: From zero to insight in days.

s1.title: Connect sources
s1.desc: Meta Ads, CRMs, payment platforms. Data flowing on the same day.

s2.title: Configure the product
s2.desc: Define funnel, average ticket, and goals. Upload PDFs and brand guides. AI reads and uses as context.

s3.title: AI analyzes and proposes
s3.desc: Automatic weekly insights. Optimization queue prioritized by impact. Agent available 24/7.

s4.title: You approve. It executes.
s4.desc: Nothing changes without your approval. One click executes via API with full audit.

s3.label: more products managed by the same team

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Per product. No fine print.
pricing.subtitle: Same features across all plans — including AI Agent. Price varies by scale of operation and level of human support.

starter.desc: Start with focus. One brand, real data, AI operating from day one.

growth.scope: Up to 3 brands · up to 5 products
growth.desc: Scaled operation with human support. Ideal for managers with multiple clients.
features: Up to 3 brands · up to 5 products

scale.desc: Unlimited operation with a dedicated strategic specialist by your side every day.

pricing.footer: All plans include a free trial with real data. No credit card required to start.

cta.title:
Ready to operate with clear
vision of what lies ahead?
cta.subtitle: 30-minute demo with real data. No slides, no pitch.
cta.startTrial: Start free. No credit card. Instant access.

demoModal.label: Early access
demoModal.title: Book demo
demoModal.subtitle: 30 minutes. Real data. Response within 24h.
demoModal.name: Name
demoModal.validationError: Please fill in name, email, and WhatsApp.
demoModal.successMessage: Our team will contact you via WhatsApp within 24h to confirm your demo time.

socialProof.label: Trusted by growth teams
socialProof.quote: "We stopped guessing and started deciding. Clarivus turned our data into a weekly action plan."
socialProof.author: — Ana Lima, Growth Lead · Velaris Co.

welcome.title: Welcome, Vini
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your Clarivus. You'll see your first insights in under 10 minutes.

welcomeScreen.title:
Set up your operation
in minutes
welcomeScreen.subtitle: Connect your data sources, build your funnel, and see how to turn media spend into revenue with intelligence.
welcomeScreen.detail: We'll guide you step by step to connect your accounts and structure your business view.

integrationScreen.title: Connect your data sources
integrationScreen.subtitle: Select and connect the tools that are part of your operation. You can configure only what you already use.
integrationScreen.siteTitle: Where do visits and conversions happen?

siteOptions.landing: I have a landing page / website
siteOptions.checkout: I use an external checkout page

integrationScreen.aiTipWhatsapp: If you sell via WhatsApp, you can proceed without a landing page. We'll calculate traffic directly from your ad platform.
integrationScreen.aiTipNoLeads: If you don't have a CRM yet, we can start from the revenue source.

funnelScreen.title: Build your funnel
funnelScreen.subtitle: Drag and organize the stages that represent how your ad spend turns into revenue.
funnelScreen.aiGap: We noticed you connected media and revenue, but haven't connected a lead source yet. Want to add one?
funnelScreen.aiFunnelSuggestion: We built the funnel {{funnel}} based on your integrations. Customize as you wish.
funnelScreen.metricsSubtitle: Choose the 3 KPIs you want to see at the top of your dashboard. You can change this later.

dataCheck.title: Review your data health
dataCheck.subtitle: Before finishing, check that each funnel stage is receiving data correctly.
dataCheck.readySubtitle: Now let's turn your data into business insights.
dataCheck.insightAnalyze: You can already analyze ad spend, traffic, and purchases.
dataCheck.insightNoLeads: Your funnel has no lead stage, but this can be normal for direct-to-purchase operations.
dataCheck.insightConnectLeads: Connecting a lead source can improve your conversion analysis.

greetings.0: Hey! 👋 I'm Clarivus AI. I can help you set up your operation. Tell me: what type of business do you run?
greetings.1: Let's connect your data sources. Tell me which tools you use for ads, analytics, and sales — I'll guide you!
greetings.2: Time to build your funnel! Tell me how your sales journey works and I'll suggest the best structure.
greetings.3: Almost there! I'm here if you have questions about data quality or want to adjust anything.

quickSuggestions.integrations2: I sell via WhatsApp, do I need a site?
quickSuggestions.funnel2: Do I need a leads stage?
quickSuggestions.validation1: Can I finish without connecting leads?

alert.partialAttribution: Partial attribution: 34% of conversions have no trackable source.

competitor.useInsight: Use this insight in AI Agent →

attribution.title: Attribution
attribution.subtitle: UTM tracking diagnostics · Orbit
attribution.healthDesc: Critical attribution gap. R$18,400 in spend without trackable source this month.

billing.title: Billing

billing.currencyNote: Billing currency: BRL · To change to USD or EUR, contact support.
billing.billingNote: Billing is automatic. Your subscription renews on the 1st of each month. To cancel or change plan, go to Manage plan.

integrations.contextDesc: Files and URLs the AI Agent uses to personalize insights.

funnelWizard.validationTitle: Here's what we found from last month
funnelWizard.validationSubtitle: Confirm this looks right before we activate your dashboard.
funnelWizard.successSubtitle: Syncing your data. First insights ready in a few minutes.
